ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the service request was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the service request was completed */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the service types table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service request */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the service request location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the service request location */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the service request location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the service request location */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward where the service request is located */,
  "police_district" INTEGER /* Police district where the service request is located */,
  "community_area" INTEGER /* Community area where the service request is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the service request location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the service request location */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the geographic locations table */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the submitter */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the issue */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the personnel assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images related to the service request */,
  "videos" TEXT /* Videos related to the service request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the personnel belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., manager, technician) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being assigned */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel the request is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the request was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the personnel who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward where the service request is located */,
  "police_district" INTEGER /* Police district where the service request is located */,
  "community_area" INTEGER /* Community area where the service request is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the service request location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the service request location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, city official) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being analyzed */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of service request */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the service request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service request */,
  "resolved_time" REAL /* Time taken to resolve the service request */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Date the service request was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being geocoded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the service request */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the service request location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the service request location */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometry of the service request location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being notified */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being audited */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the service request */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* Name of the personnel who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
